settings.title: Settings
settings.account_desc: Manage your account settings and connected experiences across the Ba-Yu platform.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.subtitle: Choose App Theme
theme.description: Customize the appearance of the Ba-Yu app for a more comfortable reading and learning experience.
theme.light_desc: Clean and bright appearance, suitable for bright room conditions.
theme.dark_desc: Dims the screen, comfortable for your eyes at night.
theme.system_desc: Adjusts the appearance to your device settings.

language.description: Customize the Ba-Yu app display language according to your preference.

language.info: Language changes will be applied immediately to all app interface elements. User-created content (notes, comments) remains in its original language.

security.title: Password & Security
security.change_password_desc: Make sure your new password is unique and strong, consisting of at least 8 characters with a combination of letters and numbers.
security.two_factor_desc: Protect your account with an additional layer of security. We will ask for a verification code when you log in from a new device.
security.login_history_desc: List of devices that recently accessed your account. If you notice any suspicious activity, change your password immediately.

privacy_settings.deactivate_success: Your account has been deactivated and will be permanently deleted in 30 days.
privacy_settings.deactivate_failed: Failed to deactivate account. Please try again later.
privacy_settings.title: Privacy & Account
privacy_settings.desc_private: Only followers can view your profile and notes. Your comments on other's posts will still be publicly visible.
privacy_settings.desc_public: Everyone can view your profile and notes, and interact with the content you share.
privacy_settings.deactivate_desc: Your account will be hidden (dormant) from the Ba-Yu platform. Your profile, notes, and comments will not be visible to other users. If you do not log back in within 30 days, all your data will be permanently deleted.
privacy_settings.dialog_desc: Your account will be hidden from the public and enter a Dormant state for 30 days. You can reactivate it by logging in before the 30 days expire. Are you sure you want to proceed?

follow_requests.title: Follow Requests
follow_requests.no_requests: There are no new follow requests. When someone asks to follow you, you can manage it here.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.hero_desc: Your data is safe with Ba-Yu. We maintain transparency and data protection as our top priority.
privacy_page.collection_desc: We only collect minimal information necessary to support your learning process:
privacy_page.usages: Enabling note sharing.,Providing important notifications.,Improving platform features.
privacy_page.footer: © 2026 Ba-Yu Platform. Your Privacy is Our Trust.

terms_page.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_page.hero_desc: Last updated: May 7, 2026. Rules for a comfortable Ba-Yu learning ecosystem.
terms_page.section1_desc: By accessing and using the Ba-Yu platform, you are deemed to have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not continue using our services for mutual security.
terms_page.section2_desc: To use the note-sharing feature, you are required to register with accurate information. You are fully responsible for:
terms_page.section2_items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account password.,All activities that occur under your account.,Providing true and accurate information.
terms_page.section3_quote: "Any notes you upload to Ba-Yu remain yours. However, by uploading them, you grant Ba-Yu a license to display, distribute, and promote that content within our platform ecosystem for educational purposes."
terms_page.allowed_items: Sharing original study materials.,Providing positive comments.,Downloading for personal reference.
terms_page.prohibited_items: Uploading plagiarized content.,Spreading hate speech.,Damaging the platform system.
terms_page.contact: Have questions? Contact support@ba-yu.id

community_guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
community_guidelines.hero_desc: Let's create a safe, positive, and supportive learning environment on Ba-Yu.
community_guidelines.rules_desc: The following actions may result in account deletion or demotion:
community_guidelines.rules: Uploading plagiarized notes.,Hate speech, discrimination, or SARA.,Spam, illegal promotions, or fraud.,Sharing other people's personal information (doxxing).

help_page.title: Help Center
help_page.hero_desc: Find answers or contact our support team below.
help_page.guidelines_desc: Read the rules and ethics of sharing notes on Ba-Yu.

about_page.title: About Us
about_page.hero_desc: Get closer to the journey, mission, and team behind the Ba-Yu Platform.
about_page.vision_desc: We believe every student deserves equal access to quality materials. Ba-Yu was built to facilitate fair, safe, and accessible note exchange for students across Indonesia.
about_page.community_desc: Thousands of students and experts from various educational institutions have joined. With strict verification and reporting systems, we keep this ecosystem positive and constructive.

careers_page.title: Careers
careers_page.hero_desc: Join us in building the future education ecosystem.
careers_page.no_vacancies_desc: We are not currently opening new positions, but we are always interested in talented individuals.

blog_page.title: Blog & Updates
blog_page.hero_desc: Stories, insights, and the latest feature updates from the development team.
blog_page.coming_soon_desc: We are preparing interesting articles about education and technology for you. Stay tuned for our premiere launch!

notif_detail.not_found_desc: This message may have been deleted or is no longer available.

landing.philosophy_text: We believe that the best education is born from collaboration. Ba-Yu is here to help you organize ideas, share insights, and grow together in a supportive learning community.
landing.philosophy_motto: Ba-Yu Philosophy — Learn, Share, Grow Together
landing.subj_math_desc: Complex LaTeX & Calculus formulas are now easy to understand.
landing.subj_science_desc: From the laws of thermodynamics to the structure of biological cells.
landing.subj_lang_desc: Analysis of grammar, prose, and linguistic rhetoric.
landing.subj_social_desc: Tectonic maps, demographics and sociological structure of society.
landing.subj_coding_desc: Note code snippets, API documentation, and algorithm logic.
landing.subj_history_desc: Timelines of civilizations, historical archives, and ancient remains.
landing.cockpit_latex_desc: Write math and science formulas as beautifully as professional academic journals using the high-speed KaTeX rendering engine.
landing.cockpit_verif_desc: Each crucial note can be reviewed by a subject matter expert or verified teacher to ensure the correctness of the formulas and concepts.
landing.cockpit_search_desc: Search for keywords, topics, even specific LaTeX formulas across community records instantly in the blink of an eye.
landing.cockpit_comm_desc: Build a consistent daily study habit with thousands of other students with an interactive streak system and exclusive rewards.
landing.hero_desc: Turn your study notes from elementary school to college into a structured insight portfolio with an easy LaTeX editor.
landing.multilang_desc: Ba-Yu supports interfaces in 40+ languages, allowing students from all over the world to collaborate and learn comfortably using our platform.
landing.explore_title: Various Fields of Science on One Platform.
landing.feature_desc: We designed a smart note-taking ecosystem to help you organize, verify, and master each course material effectively.
landing.feat1_desc: Write math, calculus, and science formulas as beautifully as professional academic journals using the high-speed KaTeX rendering engine.
landing.feat2_desc: No more doubt the material is wrong. Learn with peace of mind from trusted notes approved by expert reviewers.
landing.feat3_desc: Build a solid daily study habit with thousands of other students with the interactive daily streak system.
landing.feat4_desc: Search for specific LaTeX formulas, physics theories, or programming snippets across the community's public records instantly in milliseconds.
landing.feat5_desc: Share your notes and discuss science formulas and programming code with thousands of other highly dedicated students.
landing.cta_desc: Join for free and discover a more structured way to organize your notes and study insights.
